question_intent: average number of games won by teams that have at least one coach who has won the Jack Adams award, and have played at least 10 games against teams in the Eastern Conference

plan.question_intent: average number of games won by teams that have at least one coach who has won the Jack Adams award, and have played at least 10 games against teams in the Eastern Conference
plan.detail_query: SELECT c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t, COUNT(DISTINCT a.award) AS jack_adams_awards, COUNT(DISTINCT tv.oppid) AS games_against_eastern_conf FROM coaches AS c JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON c.tmid = tv.tmid AND c.year = tv.year JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid JOIN abbrev AS ca ON ot.confid = ca.code WHERE (ca.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tv.w >= 10) GROUP BY c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.award) >= 1)

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t, COUNT(DISTINCT a.award) AS jack_adams_awards, COUNT(DISTINCT tv.oppid) AS games_against_eastern_conf
join_clauses: JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON c.tmid = tv.tmid AND c.year = tv.year
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON ot.confid = ca.code
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t
blocks.notes: coaches with at least one Jack Adams award, and games against Eastern Conference teams with at least 10 wins

build_logs.notes: coaches with at least one Jack Adams award, and games against Eastern Conference teams with at least 10 wins

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM coaches AS c
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM coaches AS c
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON c.tmid = tv.tmid AND c.year = tv.year
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM coaches AS c
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON c.tmid = tv.tmid AND c.year = tv.year
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM coaches AS c
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON c.tmid = tv.tmid AND c.year = tv.year
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN abbrev AS ca ON ot.confid = ca.code
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM coaches AS c
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON c.tmid = tv.tmid AND c.year = tv.year
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON ot.confid = ca.code
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM coaches AS c
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON c.tmid = tv.tmid AND c.year = tv.year
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON ot.confid = ca.code
WHERE (ca.fullname = 'Eastern Conference')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM coaches AS c
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON c.tmid = tv.tmid AND c.year = tv.year
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON ot.confid = ca.code
WHERE (ca.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tv.w >= 10)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM coaches AS c
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON c.tmid = tv.tmid AND c.year = tv.year
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON ot.confid = ca.code
WHERE (ca.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tv.w >= 0)
LIMIT 5

SELECT c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t, COUNT(DISTINCT a.award) AS jack_adams_awards, COUNT(DISTINCT tv.oppid) AS games_against_eastern_conf
FROM coaches AS c
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON c.tmid = tv.tmid AND c.year = tv.year
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON ot.confid = ca.code
WHERE (ca.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tv.w >= 0)
GROUP BY c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.award) >= 1)

SELECT c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t, COUNT(DISTINCT a.award) AS jack_adams_awards, COUNT(DISTINCT tv.oppid) AS games_against_eastern_conf
FROM coaches AS c
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON c.tmid = tv.tmid AND c.year = tv.year
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON ot.confid = ca.code
WHERE (ca.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tv.w >= 0)
GROUP BY c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.award) >= 1)

build_logs.notes: average number of games won by coaches with at least one Jack Adams award, and have played at least 10 games against teams in the Eastern Conference

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t, COUNT(DISTINCT a.award) AS jack_adams_awards, COUNT(DISTINCT tv.oppid) AS games_against_eastern_conf
FROM coaches AS c
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON c.tmid = tv.tmid AND c.year = tv.year
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON ot.confid = ca.code
WHERE (ca.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tv.w >= 0)
GROUP BY c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.award) >= 1)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.w) AS avg_games_won
FROM (SELECT c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t, COUNT(DISTINCT a.award) AS jack_adams_awards, COUNT(DISTINCT tv.oppid) AS games_against_eastern_conf
FROM coaches AS c
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON c.tmid = tv.tmid AND c.year = tv.year
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON ot.confid = ca.code
WHERE (ca.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tv.w >= 0)
GROUP BY c.coachid, c.year, c.tmid, c.g, c.w, c.l, c.t
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.award) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf, COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (ab.code = 'EC' OR ab.code = 'WA')
GROUP BY t.tmid, t.year, t.name, t.w, t.gf
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT c.coachid) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.games_won)
FROM (SELECT t.tmid AS team_id, t.w AS games_won, COUNT(tv.oppid) AS games_lost
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON t.tmid = tv.tmid
JOIN teams AS ot ON tv.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ca ON t.confid = ca.code
JOIN abbrev AS oa ON ot.confid = oa.code
WHERE (ca.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (oa.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tv.l < 10)
GROUP BY t.tmid, t.w
HAVING (COUNT(tv.oppid) > 0)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average number of games won by coaches who have received at least one Jack Adams Award and coached at least one game against a team from the Eastern Conference?
